bumpType.description: Same kinds of bumps permitted by semver https://github.com/npm/node-semver

all.description: Bumps all packages in the specified 'scope' at once

exclude.description: Comma-delimited list of projects that should not be bumped when using the --all flag

explicitVersion.description: Explicit version to set. If provided, bumpType and prereleaseTag are ignored.

scope.description: Which package scope --all targets. 'vNext' (default) for converged packages, 'tools' for public tools packages.

versionSuffix.description: Suffix to append to each package's current version: {version}-{suffix}. Mutually exclusive with bumpType and explicitVersion. Requires --all.
